versions.version_description: The interlude is completely rewritten on the chords and sounds much more like the original than the existing chord contributions.
Original tabbed out with the help of this tutorial. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JFimkHUAB8w changed chords and added small transition.
I couldn't find a version where the chords on the 3rd verse sounds similar to the orignal song so I made a few changes and tried to keep this version easier to the beginners.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Slow Dancing In A Burning Room
Waiting On The World To Change

content:

[Intro]
[ch]E7sus4/B[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Em7/A[/ch]   [ch]D6[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Em7/A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]E7sus4/B[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Em7/A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
  I know a girl she puts the color inside of my world.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]Em7/A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
But she's just like a maze, where all of the walls all continually change.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]Em7/A[/ch]                     [ch]D6[/ch] 
    And I've done all I can to stand on her steps with my heart in my hand.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Em7/A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
    Now I'm starting to see, maybe its got nothing to do with me.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Em7/A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Fathers be good to your daugh-ters.[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]Em7/A[/ch]   [ch]D6[/ch]
Daughters will love like you do.[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Em7/A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Girls become lovers, who turn into mothers  [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Em7/A[/ch]     [ch]D6[/ch]
So, mothers be good to your daughters too.[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Em7/A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]
Oooh, you see that skin?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em7/A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]    
It's the same she's been standing in...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]Em7/A[/ch]
    since the day, she saw him walking away, now she's left...[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]
cleaning up the mess he made.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]
So[/tab]

[tab][ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Em7/A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Em7/A[/ch]     [ch]D6[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D9[/ch]    [ch]Gm/D[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A7/D[/ch]                          [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch]
  Boys you can break, you'll find out how much they can take.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]                [ch]Gm11[/ch]
Boys will be strong, and boys soldier on but boys would be gone without[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A13[/ch]
warmth from a woman's good, good heart.[/tab]

[ch]E7sus4/B[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Em7/A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]E7sus4/B[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Em7/A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
